---
title: "Announcement about MAD213 Basic Statistics Final, on January 22" 
description: "Final"
date: 2021-01-20T08:00:00-03:00
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float:
        collapsed: true
        smooth_scroll: true
    toc_depth: 3
    fig_caption: yes
    code_folding: show
    number_sections: true

fontsize: 14pt
tags: []
comments: false
---

Dear all,

`r emo::ji("loudspeaker")` MAD213 - FINAL

We will be having discussion about exam rules via Zoom, prior to the exam, which will be starting at 10h00.

See you at January 22, 2021 at 10h00.

Good luck,

`r emo::ji("sun")` GERTUNC `r emo::ji("bar_chart")`
